name: charge-area
title: Electric Vehicle Charging Station Visual Interface
role: This visual interface allows for monitoring the status and management of electric vehicle charging stations integrated within the smart city network. The associated images are charge-area.png and charge(1).jpg through charge(5).jpg, which detail the charging area design and status.

name: chatbot
title: Smart City AI Chatbot Assistant
role: This visual component is the main interface for the Smart City's AI chatbot assistant. It allows users to ask questions about city services, find directions, report issues, and access information. The full set of images (chatbot(1).png through chatbot(6).png) show different states of user interaction, help screens, and developer console views.

name: facial-recognition
title: Biometric Access Control and Security System
role: This diagram illustrates the core components of the facial recognition system. It shows real-time face detection, data matching, and authorization processes used for secure access to city facilities and for general security monitoring.

name: indoor-localization
title: Conceptual Indoor Positioning System
role: This image presents the conceptual design and setup for an indoor localization system. It features a grid of anchors to triangulate positions and mobile devices as target nodes, demonstrating the system's role in facilitating indoor navigation in complex buildings.

name: parking
title: Smart Parking Management System View
role: This image shows a visual map of the smart parking lot with real-time occupancy monitoring. Available spaces are highlighted in green, and occupied slots are shown in red, providing a visual guide for drivers and system administrators.

name: simulator
title: Autonomous Vehicle Driving Simulator
role: This is a top-down view of the self-driving car simulator. It is a critical component of the transportation module, used to test autonomous algorithms, path planning, and obstacle avoidance within a controlled, simulated urban environment before deployment to real vehicles.

name: smart-city-poster
title: Smart City Project Comprehensive Poster
role: This comprehensive poster provides a high-level overview and promotional material for the entire Smart City project, summarizing all key modules and their integrated roles in creating a modern, intelligent urban environment.

name: voice-assistant
title: Voice and Gesture Assistant Interface
role: This visual shows the conceptual interface for a voice-controlled assistant and gesture recognition system. The images voice-assistant(1).jpeg and voice-assistant(2).jpeg depict developer views of the interface, showcasing its core functionality for natural interaction with smart city services.

name: voice-assistant
title: Voice and Gesture Assistant Interface
role: This visual shows the conceptual interface for a voice-controlled assistant and gesture recognition system. The images voice-assistant(1).jpeg and voice-assistant(2).jpeg depict developer views of the interface, showcasing its core functionality for natural interaction with smart city services.
